<!--
Pull Request Template
Ensures consistent PR descriptions and helps reviewers
-->

## 📝 Description
<!-- What does this PR do? Why are these changes needed? -->


## 🎯 Type of Change
<!-- Mark the relevant option with an X: [X] -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] 📚 Documentation
- [ ] ♻️ Refactoring
- [ ] ⚡ Performance
- [ ] 🔒 Security
- [ ] 🚀 Breaking change


## ✅ Testing
<!-- How can this be tested? -->

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Tests pass locally: `uv run pytest`
- [ ] Lint passes: `uv run ruff check .`
- [ ] Format correct: `uv run ruff format --check .`
- [ ] Types pass: `uv run mypy .`


## 📋 Pre-merge Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project style guide
- [ ] Self-reviewed my own code
- [ ] Comments added for complex logic
- [ ] No new warnings generated
- [ ] Tests pass locally
- [ ] Coverage maintained or improved


## 🔗 Related Issues
Closes #(issue)


## 📸 Screenshots (if applicable)
<!-- Add screenshots or output logs -->
